title: Refactor concurrency group name and enable automatic merge conflict resolution
author: YoannDev90

gist.headline: Conflict resolution, automated
gist.blurb: We taught our app review workflow how to untangle its own merge conflicts. Less manual git wrangling means faster app approvals for the community.
gist.summary: Updated the app review submission GitHub Actions workflow to use a static concurrency group and automatically resolve merge conflicts using the 'theirs' strategy.
gist.impact: Maintainers spend less time manually resolving git conflicts on community app submissions, speeding up the review pipeline.
gist.visual_concept: The PR automates merge conflict resolution for app reviews. Visual symbols: untangling wires/vines (resolving conflicts), clipboards (reviews), automation (robots). Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together to untangle code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot working together to untangle glowing code-vines on a wooden workbench. The robot holds a clipboard with a green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
